                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Douglas Olaya</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Coach</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/COACHES/GLADYS TORRADO.jpeg"
                      alt="Gladys Torrado"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Gladys Torrado</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Coach</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/COACHES/LUZ AMELIA AMADO.jpg"
                      alt="Luz Amelia"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Luz Amelia</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Coach</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">

                <article class="team-card-new">

                    />
                  </div>

                <article class="team-card-new">

                    />
                  </div>

                  </div>

                <article class="team-card-new">

                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/ANA MARIA CERON.jpeg"
                      alt="Ana María Cerón"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Ana María Cerón</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/ANTONIO CRESPO.jpeg"
                      alt="Antonio Crespo"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Antonio Crespo</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor - Finanzas Personales</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/CARLOS VARELA.jpg"
                      alt="Carlos Varela"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Carlos Varela</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>
                  </div>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">

                      src="img/MENTORES/CAROLINA QUIROGA.jpeg"

                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Carolina Quiroga</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/DIANA FLOREZ.png"
                      alt="Diana Flórez"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">

                  </div>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">

                      alt="Gloria García"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Gloria García</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/GLORIA NAVAS.jpeg"
                      alt="Gloria Navas"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Gloria Navas</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/GONZALO ARIAS.jpeg"
                      alt="Gonzalo Arias"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Gonzalo Arias</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>
                  </div>
                </article>

                <article class="team-card-new">
                  <div class="team-card-image">
                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/JUAN MANUEL CABRERA.jpeg"
                      alt="Juan Manuel Cabrera"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div class="team-card-content">
                    <h4 class="team-card-name">Juan Manuel Cabrera</h4>
                    <p class="team-card-role">Mentor</p>

                    <img
                      src="img/MENTORES/SANDRA GORDILLO.jpeg"
                      alt="Sandra Gordillo"
                    />

                      src="img/MENTORES/TRUDDY HARKER.jpeg"
                      alt="Truddy Harker"

                  </div>

      </section>

      <section id="noticias" class="section news-new">
        <div class="container">
          <div class="news-header-new">
            <h3 class="section-title-new">NOTICIAS</h3>
            <p class="section-lead-new">
              Mantente al día con nuestras últimas novedades y casos de éxito
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="news-grid-new">
            <article class="news-card-new">
              <div class="news-card-image">
                <img
                  src="img/FOTOS/WhatsApp Image 2025-08-09 at 10.09.24 AM (5).jpeg"
                  alt="Historias que inspiran"
                />
                <div class="news-card-overlay">
                  <span class="news-card-category">Inspiración</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="news-card-content">
                <h4 class="news-card-title">Historias que inspiran</h4>
                <p class="news-card-description">
                  Casos de éxito y emprendedores que transforman sus
                  comunidades.
                </p>
                <a href="#" class="news-card-link read-more" data-news="1">
                  <span>Leer más</span>
                  <svg
                    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                    width="18"
                    height="18"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                  >
                    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                    <polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline>
                  </svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </article>

            <article class="news-card-new">
              <div class="news-card-image">
                <img
                  src="img/FOTOS/IMG-20241129-WA0006.jpg"
                  alt="Noticias corporativas"
                />
                <div class="news-card-overlay">
                  <span class="news-card-category">Corporativo</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="news-card-content">
                <h4 class="news-card-title">Noticias corporativas</h4>
                <p class="news-card-description">
                  Nuevas alianzas y expansión regional.
                </p>
                <a href="#" class="news-card-link read-more" data-news="2">
                  <span>Leer más</span>
                  <svg
                    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                    width="18"
                    height="18"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                  >
                    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                    <polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline>
                  </svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </article>

            <article class="news-card-new">
              <div class="news-card-image">
                <img
                  src="img/FOTOS/Eventos y conferencias.jpeg"
                  alt="Eventos"
                />
                <div class="news-card-overlay">
                  <span class="news-card-category">Eventos</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="news-card-content">
                <h4 class="news-card-title">Eventos y conferencias</h4>
                <p class="news-card-description">
                  Red que Transforma y Top Speakers en la región.
                </p>
                <a href="#" class="news-card-link read-more" data-news="3">
                  <span>Leer más</span>
                  <svg
                    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                    width="18"
                    height="18"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                  >
                    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                    <polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline>
                  </svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="apoyar" class="apoyar-section-new">
        <div class="container">
          <div class="apoyar-header">
            <h2 class="apoyar-title-new">CÓMO APOYAR</h2>
            <p class="apoyar-subtitle-new">
              Súmate a una red que transforma desde el propósito
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="apoyar-grid-new">
            <!-- Tarjeta Empresas -->
            <article class="apoyar-card">
              <div class="card-icon-wrapper">
                <svg
                  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  stroke-width="2"
                  stroke-linecap="round"
                  stroke-linejoin="round"
                  class="card-icon-svg"
                >
                  <path d="M16 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"></path>
                  <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"></circle>
                  <path d="M22 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"></path>
                  <path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"></path>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="card-title-new">Empresas Aliadas</h3>
              <p class="card-description-new">
                Vincula tu compañía a nuestros programas e impulsa el bienestar
                de tus colaboradores.
              </p>
              <a
                href="#contacto"
                class="btn-apoyar btn-primary-new"
                id="empresaInfoBtn"
              >
                <span>Más información</span>
                <svg
                  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                  width="18"
                  height="18"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  stroke-width="2"
                  stroke-linecap="round"
                  stroke-linejoin="round"
                >
                  <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                  <polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline>
                </svg>
              </a>
            </article>

            <!-- Tarjeta Donaciones -->
            <article class="apoyar-card apoyar-card-featured">
              <div class="card-badge">Apoya hoy</div>
              <div class="card-icon-wrapper card-icon-featured">
                <svg
                  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="currentColor"
                  class="card-icon-svg"
                >
                  <path
                    d="M20.84 4.61a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 0L12 5.67l-1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 7.78l1.06 1.06L12 21.23l7.78-7.78 1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0 0-7.78z"
                  ></path>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="card-title-new">Donaciones Individuales</h3>
              <p class="card-description-new">
                Tu aporte ayuda a más personas a recuperar su productividad y
                esperanza.
              </p>

              <div class="donation-details">
                <div class="detail-row">
                  <span class="detail-label">Banco</span>
                  <span class="detail-value">Bancolombia</span>
                </div>
                <div class="detail-row">
                  <span class="detail-label">Tipo</span>
                  <span class="detail-value">Cuenta de ahorros</span>
                </div>
                <div class="detail-row detail-row-highlight">
                  <span class="detail-label">Número</span>
                  <span class="detail-value detail-value-large"
                    >084-000103-67</span
                  >
                </div>
                <div class="detail-row">
                  <span class="detail-label">A nombre de</span>
                  <span class="detail-value">Fundación Colombia Comparte</span>
                </div>
                <div class="detail-row">
                  <span class="detail-label">NIT</span>
                  <span class="detail-value">901.213.196-8</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card-divider"></div>

              <a
                href="https://checkout.bold.co/payment/LNK_Z48LF520TB"
                target="_blank"
                rel="noopener"
                class="btn-apoyar btn-secondary-new"
              >
                <svg
                  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                  width="18"
                  height="18"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  stroke-width="2"
                  stroke-linecap="round"
                  stroke-linejoin="round"
                >
                  <rect x="1" y="4" width="22" height="16" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                  <line x1="1" y1="10" x2="23" y2="10"></line>
                </svg>
                <span>Donar con tarjeta</span>
              </a>
              <p class="card-note">
                También aceptamos tarjetas de crédito y débito
              </p>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="contacto" class="contact-section-new">
        <div class="container">
          <div class="contact-header">
            <h2 class="contact-title-new">CONTÁCTANOS</h2>
            <p class="contact-subtitle-new">
              Pronto uno de nuestros gerentes regionales se pondrá en contacto
              contigo
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="contact-wrapper">
            <form
              class="contact-form-new"
              id="contactFormNew"
              action="https://api.web3forms.com/submit"
              method="POST"
            >
              <!-- Web3Forms Access Key -->
              <input
                type="hidden"
                name="access_key"
                value="7a1764d4-f138-4e7a-97e2-688c2b843930"
              />
              <input
                type="hidden"
                name="subject"
                value="Nuevo mensaje desde Latinoamérica Comparte"
              />
              <input type="hidden" name="from_name" value="Formulario Web" />

              <div class="form-grid">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label for="nombre" class="form-label">Nombre *</label>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    id="nombre"
                    name="nombre"
                    class="form-input"
                    placeholder="Tu nombre"
                    required
                  />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label for="apellido" class="form-label">Apellido</label>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    id="apellido"
                    name="apellido"
                    class="form-input"
                    placeholder="Tu apellido"
                  />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                  <label for="telefono" class="form-label">Teléfono</label>
                  <input
                    type="tel"
                    id="telefono"
                    name="telefono"
                    class="form-input"
                    placeholder="+57 300 123 4567"
                  />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                  <label for="pais" class="form-label">País</label>
                  <select id="pais" name="pais" class="form-input form-select">
                    <option value="">Selecciona tu país</option>
                    <option value="Colombia">Colombia</option>
                    <option value="Ecuador">Ecuador</option>
                    <option value="Chile">Chile</option>
                    <option value="Argentina">Argentina</option>
                    <option value="Otro">Otro</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Campos de empresa (ocultos inicialmente) -->
              <div
                id="camposEmpresaNew"
                class="empresa-fields"
                style="display: none"
              >
                <div class="form-grid">
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="nombreEmpresa" class="form-label"
                      >Nombre de la Empresa</label
                    >
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      id="nombreEmpresa"
                      name="nombreEmpresa"
                      class="form-input"
                      placeholder="Empresa S.A."
                    />
                  </div>

                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="cargo" class="form-label">Cargo</label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      id="cargo"
                      name="cargo"
                      class="form-input"
                      placeholder="Tu cargo en la empresa"
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="form-group form-group-full">
                <label for="email" class="form-label"
                  >Correo electrónico *</label
                >
                <input
                  type="email"
                  id="email"
                  name="email"
                  class="form-input"
                  placeholder="tucorreo@ejemplo.com"
                  required
                />
              </div>

              <div class="form-group form-group-full">
                <label for="mensaje" class="form-label"
                  >¿En qué podemos ayudarte? *</label
                >
                <textarea
                  id="mensaje"
                  name="mensaje"
                  class="form-textarea"
                  rows="5"
                  placeholder="Cuéntanos cómo podemos ayudarte..."
                  required
                ></textarea>
              </div>

              <div class="form-actions">
                <button type="submit" class="btn-submit-new">
                  <span>Enviar mensaje</span>
                  <svg
                    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                    width="18"
                    height="18"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                  >
                    <line x1="22" y1="2" x2="11" y2="13"></line>
                    <polygon points="22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2"></polygon>
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </main>
    <div id="newsModal" class="modal-new">
      <div class="modal-backdrop" id="modalBackdrop"></div>
      <div class="modal-container-new">
        <button
          class="modal-close-new"
          id="modalCloseBtn"
          aria-label="Cerrar modal"
        >
          <svg
            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
            width="24"
            height="24"
            viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            fill="none"
            stroke="currentColor"
            stroke-width="2"
            stroke-linecap="round"
            stroke-linejoin="round"
          >
            <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"></line>
            <line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"></line>
          </svg>
        </button>
        <div class="modal-content-new">
          <div class="modal-image-wrapper">
            <img id="modalImage" src="" alt="" class="modal-image-new" />
          </div>
          <div class="modal-body-new">
            <h3 id="modalTitle" class="modal-title-new"></h3>
            <div id="modalDescription" class="modal-description-new"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <footer class="site-footer">
      <div class="container footer-grid">
        <div class="footer-brand">
          <img
            src="img/LOGOS/Latinoamérica Co B.png"
            alt="Latinoamérica Comparte"
            class="footer-logo"
          />
          <p>"Cuando un país comparte, Latinoamérica avanza."</p>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-links">
          <strong>Enlaces rápidos</strong>
          <ul>
            <li><a href="index.html">Inicio</a></li>
            <li><a href="quienes.html">Quiénes Somos</a></li>
            <li><a href="paises.html">Países</a></li>
            <li><a href="impacto.html">Impacto</a></li>
            <li><a href="noticias.html">Noticias</a></li>
            <li><a href="apoyar.html">Cómo Apoyar</a></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="footer-social">
          <strong>Síguenos</strong>
          <div class="social-icons-grid">
            <a
              href="https://www.instagram.com/latinoamericacomparte/?hl=es-la"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener"
              class="social-icon instagram"
              aria-label="Instagram"
            >
              <svg
                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="currentColor"
              >
                <path
                  d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"
                />
              </svg>
            </a>
            <a
              href="https://www.facebook.com/Ccomparte"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener"
              class="social-icon facebook"
              aria-label="Facebook"
            >
              <svg
                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="currentColor"
              >
                <path
                  d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"
                />
              </svg>
            </a>
            <a
              href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/latinoam%C3%A9rica-comparte-emprendimiento-conferencias-productividad-empresarial/"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener"
              class="social-icon linkedin"
              aria-label="LinkedIn"
            >
              <svg
                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="currentColor"
              >
                <path
                  d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.225 0z"
                />
              </svg>
            </a>
            <a
              href="https://www.youtube.com/@colombiacomparte"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener"
              class="social-icon youtube"
              aria-label="YouTube"
            >
              <svg
                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="currentColor"
              >
                <path
                  d="M23.498 6.186a3.016 3.016 0 0 0-2.122-2.136C19.505 3.545 12 3.545 12 3.545s-7.505 0-9.377.505A3.017 3.017 0 0 0 .502 6.186C0 8.07 0 12 0 12s0 3.93.502 5.814a3.016 3.016 0 0 0 2.122 2.136c1.871.505 9.376.505 9.376.505s7.505 0 9.377-.505a3.015 3.015 0 0 0 2.122-2.136C24 15.93 24 12 24 12s0-3.93-.502-5.814zM9.545 15.568V8.432L15.818 12l-6.273 3.568z"
                />
              </svg>
            </a>
            <a
              href="https://www.tiktok.com/@latinoamricacomparte"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener"
              class="social-icon tiktok"
              aria-label="TikTok"
            >
              <svg
                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                fill="currentColor"
              >
                <path
                  d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 0 1-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 0 1-5.2 1.74 2.89 2.89 0 0 1 2.31-4.64 2.93 2.93 0 0 1 .88.13V9.4a6.84 6.84 0 0 0-1-.05A6.33 6.33 0 0 0 5 20.1a6.34 6.34 0 0 0 10.86-4.43v-7a8.16 8.16 0 0 0 4.77 1.52v-3.4a4.85 4.85 0 0 1-1-.1z"
                />
              </svg>
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const header = document.querySelector(".site-header");
        let ticking = false;
        window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
          if (!ticking) {
            window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
              if (window.scrollY > 100) {
                header.classList.add("scrolled");
              } else {
                header.classList.remove("scrolled");
              }
              ticking = false;
            });
            ticking = true;
          }
        });
        anime
          .timeline({})
          .add({
            targets: ".hero-title",
            translateY: [30, 0],
            opacity: [0, 1],
            duration: 600,
            easing: "easeOutQuad",
          })
          .add(
            {
              targets: ".hero-subtitle, .hero-desc",
              opacity: [0, 1],
              duration: 500,
              easing: "easeOutQuad",
            },
            "-=300"
          )
          .add(
            {
              targets: ".hero-cta .btn",
              opacity: [0, 1],
              duration: 400,
              easing: "easeOutQuad",
            },
            "-=200"
          );
        const counters = document.querySelectorAll(".counter");
        const observerOptions = { threshold: 0.5, rootMargin: "50px" };
        const counterObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
          entries.forEach((entry) => {
            if (
              entry.isIntersecting &&
              !entry.target.classList.contains("counted")
            ) {
              entry.target.classList.add("counted");
              const target = +entry.target.dataset.target;
              let current = 0;
              const increment = target / 60;
              const timer = setInterval(() => {
                current += increment;
                if (current >= target) {
                  entry.target.textContent = target;
                  clearInterval(timer);
                } else {
                  entry.target.textContent = Math.floor(current);
                }
              }, 16);
              counterObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
            }
          });
        }, observerOptions);
        counters.forEach((c) => counterObserver.observe(c));

        // Duplicar logos del carrusel para loop infinito
        const carouselTrack = document.querySelector(".carousel-track");
        if (carouselTrack) {
          const logos = Array.from(carouselTrack.children);
          logos.forEach((logo) => {
            const clone = logo.cloneNode(true);
            carouselTrack.appendChild(clone);
          });
        }

        document.querySelectorAll(".nav-links a").forEach((a) => {
          a.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            const href = a.getAttribute("href");
            if (href && href.startsWith("#")) {
              e.preventDefault();
              const el = document.querySelector(href);
              if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
            }
          });
        });
        const toggle = document.querySelector(".menu-toggle");
        toggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
          const links = document.querySelector(".nav-links");
          links.style.display =
            links.style.display === "flex" ? "none" : "flex";
          links.style.flexDirection = "column";
        });
        document.querySelectorAll(".country").forEach((c) => {
          c.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            const href = c.getAttribute("href");
            if (!href || href === "#") {
              e.preventDefault();
            }
          });
        });
        const sections = document.querySelectorAll(".section");
        const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
          (entries) => {
            entries.forEach((entry) => {
              if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = "1";
                entry.target.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
                sectionObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
              }
            });
          },
          { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: "50px" }
        );
        sections.forEach((s) => {
          s.style.opacity = "0";
          s.style.transform = "translateY(30px)";
          s.style.transition = "opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease";
          sectionObserver.observe(s);
        });

        const newsContent = {
          1: {
            title: "Historias que inspiran",
            image:
              "img/FOTOS/WhatsApp Image 2025-08-09 at 10.09.24 AM (5).jpeg",
            description: `<p>En Latinoamérica Comparte, cada historia es una prueba de que la transformación personal conduce a la transformación empresarial. Nuestros programas han impactado a más de 1,200 familias en toda la región, ayudándolas a recuperar su productividad y esperanza.</p><h4>Emprendedores que transforman</h4><p>Conoce las historias de personas que, después de enfrentar pérdidas significativas, encontraron en nuestros programas el apoyo necesario para reconstruir sus vidas y emprendimientos. Desde pequeños negocios familiares hasta empresas que hoy emplean a decenas de personas, cada caso es único y motivador.</p><h4>Impacto real en comunidades</h4><p>Nuestros emprendedores no solo reconstruyen sus propias vidas, sino que también generan empleo y desarrollo en sus comunidades. A través de:</p><ul><li>Programas de capacitación en emprendimiento con propósito</li><li>Acompañamiento personalizado por 12 meses</li><li>Acceso a redes de mentores y empresarios exitosos</li><li>Financiamiento inicial para proyectos sostenibles</li></ul><p>Cada mes compartimos nuevas historias de éxito que demuestran que cuando una persona encuentra su propósito, puede transformar no solo su vida, sino toda su comunidad.</p>`,
          },
          2: {
            title: "Noticias corporativas",
            image: "img/FOTOS/IMG-20241129-WA0006.jpg",
            description: `<p>Latinoamérica Comparte continúa expandiendo su red de impacto a través de nuevas alianzas estratégicas con empresas líderes en la región. Nuestro compromiso con el bienestar empresarial y la productividad con propósito nos ha llevado a establecer colaboraciones innovadoras.</p><h4>Nuevas alianzas estratégicas</h4><p>Este año hemos sumado a nuestra red más de 15 empresas comprometidas con el bienestar de sus colaboradores. Estas alianzas nos permiten:</p><ul><li>Implementar programas de bienestar corporativo personalizados</li><li>Desarrollar cultura organizacional orientada al propósito</li><li>Ofrecer acompañamiento a colaboradores en situaciones de duelo o pérdida</li><li>Crear redes de apoyo entre empresas de diferentes sectores</li></ul><h4>Expansión regional</h4><p>Después del éxito en Colombia, Ecuador, Chile y Argentina, estamos evaluando expandir nuestras operaciones a Perú y México en el próximo año. Cada país que se suma a esta red multiplica el impacto positivo en la región.</p><h4>Reconocimientos</h4><p>Recientemente fuimos reconocidos por ACRIP como uno de los programas más innovadores en bienestar corporativo en Latinoamérica, destacando nuestro enfoque integral que combina el desarrollo personal con la productividad empresarial.</p>`,
          },
          3: {
            title: "Eventos y conferencias",
            image: "img/FOTOS/Eventos y conferencias.jpeg",
            description: `<p>Nuestros eventos "Red que Transforma" se han convertido en espacios de inspiración, aprendizaje y conexión para líderes empresariales, emprendedores y profesionales de toda Latinoamérica.</p><h4>Red que Transforma 2025</h4><p>Nuestro evento insignia reunirá en cada país a más de 500 líderes empresariales para compartir experiencias, estrategias y casos de éxito sobre:</p><ul><li>Liderazgo con propósito en tiempos de cambio</li><li>Cultura organizacional que prioriza el bienestar</li><li>Innovación en programas de desarrollo humano</li><li>Resiliencia empresarial y transformación personal</li></ul><h4>Top Speakers internacionales</h4><p>Contamos con la participación de reconocidos conferencistas y líderes de pensamiento de toda la región, incluyendo CEOs de empresas Fortune 500, emprendedores sociales y expertos en desarrollo humano y organizacional.</p><h4>Próximos eventos</h4><p><strong>Bogotá, Colombia:</strong> 15 de marzo, 2025<br><strong>Quito, Ecuador:</strong> 22 de abril, 2025<br><strong>Santiago, Chile:</strong> 10 de junio, 2025<br><strong>Buenos Aires, Argentina:</strong> 18 de agosto, 2025</p><p>Cada evento incluye talleres prácticos, sesiones de networking y oportunidades de crear alianzas estratégicas con empresas y líderes de diferentes sectores.</p>`,
          },
        };
        // Modal mejorado con nueva estructura
        const modal = document.getElementById("newsModal");
        const modalTitle = document.getElementById("modalTitle");
        const modalImage = document.getElementById("modalImage");
        const modalDescription = document.getElementById("modalDescription");
        const modalClose = document.getElementById("modalCloseBtn");
        const modalBackdrop = document.getElementById("modalBackdrop");

        // Función para abrir modal
        function openModal(newsId) {
          const content = newsContent[newsId];
          if (content && modal) {
            modalTitle.textContent = content.title;
            modalImage.src = content.image;
            modalImage.alt = content.title;
            modalDescription.innerHTML = content.description;

            modal.classList.add("active");
            document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
          }
        }

        // Función para cerrar modal
        function closeModal() {
          modal.classList.remove("active");
          document.body.style.overflow = "";
        }

        // Event listeners para abrir modal (funciona con .read-more y .news-card-link)
        document.querySelectorAll("[data-news]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const newsId = btn.getAttribute("data-news");
            openModal(newsId);
          });
        });

        // Event listeners para cerrar modal
        if (modalClose) {
          modalClose.addEventListener("click", closeModal);
        }

        if (modalBackdrop) {
          modalBackdrop.addEventListener("click", closeModal);
        }

        // Cerrar con tecla ESC
        document.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
          if (e.key === "Escape" && modal.classList.contains("active")) {
            closeModal();
          }
        });
        // Funcionalidad del botón de equipo mejorada
        const verEquipoBtn = document.getElementById("verEquipoCompletoNew");
        const equipoCompleto = document.getElementById("equipoCompletoNew");
        const btnText = document.getElementById("btnTextNew");
        const btnIcon = document.getElementById("btnIconNew");
        if (verEquipoBtn && equipoCompleto) {
          verEquipoBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const isVisible = equipoCompleto.style.display === "block";
            if (isVisible) {
              equipoCompleto.style.opacity = "0";
              equipoCompleto.style.maxHeight = "0";
              setTimeout(() => {
                equipoCompleto.style.display = "none";
              }, 500);
              btnText.textContent = "Conoce a nuestro equipo";
              verEquipoBtn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
            } else {
              equipoCompleto.style.display = "block";
              setTimeout(() => {
                equipoCompleto.style.opacity = "1";
                equipoCompleto.style.maxHeight = "5000px";
              }, 50);
              btnText.textContent = "Ver menos";
              verEquipoBtn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
            }
          });
        }
      });

      // Manejo del envío del formulario
      const contactFormNew = document.getElementById("contactFormNew");
      const camposEmpresaNew = document.getElementById("camposEmpresaNew");

      if (contactFormNew) {
        contactFormNew.addEventListener("submit", async function (e) {
          e.preventDefault();

          const submitBtn = contactFormNew.querySelector(
            'button[type="submit"]'
          );
          const originalHTML = submitBtn.innerHTML;

          // Deshabilitar botón y mostrar estado de carga
          submitBtn.disabled = true;
          submitBtn.style.opacity = "0.7";
          submitBtn.innerHTML = "<span>Enviando mensaje...</span>";

          try {
            const formData = new FormData(contactFormNew);

            const response = await fetch(contactFormNew.action, {
              method: "POST",
              body: formData,
              headers: {
                Accept: "application/json",
              },
            });

            const data = await response.json();

            if (response.ok && data.success) {
              // Éxito
              alert(
                "¡Gracias por contactarnos! Tu mensaje ha sido enviado exitosamente. Pronto nos pondremos en contacto contigo."
              );
              contactFormNew.reset();
              if (camposEmpresaNew) {
                camposEmpresaNew.style.display = "none";
              }
            } else {
              // Error del servidor
              alert(
                data.message ||
                  "Hubo un problema al enviar tu mensaje. Por favor, intenta nuevamente."
              );
            }
          } catch (error) {
            // Error de conexión
            console.error("Error al enviar formulario:", error);
            alert(
              "No se pudo conectar con el servidor. Por favor, verifica tu conexión e intenta nuevamente."
            );
          } finally {
            // Restaurar botón
            submitBtn.disabled = false;
            submitBtn.style.opacity = "1";
            submitBtn.innerHTML = originalHTML;
          }
        });
      }
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
          Evidence 
          <form
              class="contact-form-new"
              id="contactFormNew"
              action="https://api.web3forms.com/submit"
              method="POST"
            >
          Solution

          Phase: Architecture and Design

          Use a vetted library or framework that does not allow this weakness to occur or provides constructs that make this weakness easier to avoid.

          For example, use anti-CSRF packages such as the OWASP CSRFGuard.

          Phase: Implementation

          Ensure that your application is free of cross-site scripting issues, because most CSRF defenses can be bypassed using attacker-controlled script.

          Phase: Architecture and Design

          Generate a unique nonce for each form, place the nonce into the form, and verify the nonce upon receipt of the form. Be sure that the nonce is not predictable (CWE-330).

          Note that this can be bypassed using XSS.

          Identify especially dangerous operations. When the user performs a dangerous operation, send a separate confirmation request to ensure that the user intended to perform that operation.

          Note that this can be bypassed using XSS.

          Use the ESAPI Session Management control.

          This control includes a component for CSRF.

          Do not use the GET method for any request that triggers a state change.

          Phase: Implementation

          Check the HTTP Referer header to see if the request originated from an expected page. This could break legitimate functionality, because users or proxies may have disabled sending the Referer for privacy reasons.

          Alert description

          HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is a web security policy mechanism whereby a web server declares that complying user agents (such as a web browser) are to interact with it using only secure HTTPS connections (i.e. HTTP layered over TLS/SSL). HSTS is an IETF standards track protocol and is specified in RFC 6797.

          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is configured to enforce Strict-Transport-Security.

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html  lang="es" xml:lang="es">
    <head>

                <title>Redireccionar</title>
        <style>
body {
    margin: 0;
    font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,"Noto Sans",sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Noto Color Emoji";

    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #343a40;
    text-align: left;
    background-color: #f2f2f2;
}
#page {
    margin-top: 15px;
    background: white;
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 15px;
}
#region-main {
    margin: 0 auto;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.125);
    padding: 1rem 1.25rem 1.25rem;
    background-color: #fff;
}
h1 {
    font-size: 2.34rem;
    margin: 0 0 .5rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.2;
}
.alert-danger {
    color: #6e211e;
    background-color: #f6d9d8;

    padding: .75rem 1.25rem;
}

    <body>
        <div id="page">
            <div id="region-main">
                <h1>Redireccionar</h1>
                <div style="margin-top: 3em; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; text-align:center;">Esta página debería redireccionar automáticamente. Si no ocurre nada, por favor utilice el enlace de continuar que aparece más abajo.<br /><a href="https://www.latinoamericacomparte.com/aulavirtual/login/index.php">Continuar</a></div>                            </div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>
          Solution

          Ensure that no sensitive information is leaked via redirect responses. Redirect responses should have almost no content.

          Alert description

          A cookie has been set with its SameSite attribute set to "none", which means that the cookie can be sent as a result of a 'cross-site' request. The SameSite attribute is an effective counter measure to cross-site request forgery, cross-site script inclusion, and timing attacks.

          <!DOCTYPE html>

<html  dir="ltr" lang="es-co" xml:lang="es-co">
<head>
    <title>Página Principal | EDIFICA</title>
    <link rel="shortcut icon" href="https://www.latinoamericacomparte.com/aulavirtual/pluginfile.php/1/core_admin/favicon/64x64/1770849391/Logo%20del%20programa%20de%20altos%20estudios%20en%20emprendimiento%20EDIFICA.png" />
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="keywords" content="moodle, Página Principal | EDIFICA" />
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://www.latinoamericacomparte.com/aulavirtual/theme/yui_combo.php?rollup/3.18.1/yui-moodlesimple-min.css" /><script id="firstthemesheet" type="text/css">/** Required in order to fix style inclusion problems in IE with YUI **/</script><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://www.latinoamericacomparte.com/aulavirtual/theme/styles.php/classic/1770849391_1/all" />

rm"]},"moodle-availability_profile-form":{"requires":["base","node","event","moodle-core_availability-form"]},"moodle-mod_assign-history":{"requires":["node","transition"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-quizbase":{"requires":["base","node"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-toolboxes":{"requires":["base","node","event","event-key","io","moodle-mod_quiz-quizbase","moodle-mod_quiz-util-slot","moodle-core-notification-ajaxexception"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-questionchooser":{"requires":["moodle-core-chooserdialogue","moodle-mod_quiz-util","querystring-parse"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-modform":{"requires":["base","node","event"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-autosave":{"requires":["base","node","event","event-valuechange","node-event-delegate","io-form","datatype-date-format"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-dragdrop":{"requires":["base","node","io","dom","dd","dd-scroll","moodle-core-dragdrop","moodle-core-notification","moodle-mod_quiz-quizbase","moodle-mod_quiz-util-base","moodle-mod_quiz-util-page","moodle-mod_quiz-util-slot","moodle-course-util"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-util":{"requires":["node","moodle-core-actionmenu"],"use":["moodle-mod_quiz-util-base"],"submodules":{"moodle-mod_quiz-util-base":{},"moodle-mod_quiz-util-slot":{"requires":["node","moodle-mod_quiz-util-base"]},"moodle-mod_quiz-util-page":{"requires":["node","moodle-mod_quiz-util-base"]}}},"moodle-message_airnotifier-toolboxes":{"requires":["base","node","io"]},"moodle-report_eventlist-eventfilter":{"requires":["base","event","node","node-event-delegate","datatable","autocomplete","autocomplete-filters"]},"moodle-report_loglive-fetchlogs":{"requires":["base","event","node","io","node-event-delegate"]},"moodle-gradereport_history-userselector":{"requires":["escape","event-delegate","event-key","handlebars","io-base","json-parse","moodle-core-notification-dialogue"]},"moodle-qbank_editquestion-chooser":{"requires":["moodle-core-chooserdialogue"]},"moodle-tool_lp-dragdrop-reorder":{"requires":["moodle-core-dragdrop"]},"moodle-assignfeedback_editpdf-editor":{"requires":["base","event","node","io","graphics","json","event-move","event-resize","transition","querystring-stringify-simple","moodle-core-notification-dialog","moodle-core-notification-alert","moodle-core-notification-warning","moodle-core-notification-exception","moodle-core-notification-ajaxexception"]}}},"gallery":{"name":"gallery","base":"https:\/\/www.latinoamericacomparte.com\/aulavirtual\/lib\/yuilib\/gallery\/","combine":true,"comboBase":"https:\/\/www.latinoamericacomparte.com\/aulavirtual\/theme\/yui_combo.php?","ext":false,"root":"gallery\/1770849391\/","patterns":{"gallery-":{"group":"gallery"}}}},"modules":{"core_filepicker":{"name":"core_filepicker","fullpath":"https:\/\/www.latinoamericacomparte.com\/aulavirtual\/lib\/javascript.php\/1770849391\/repository\/filepicker.js","requires":["base","node","node-event-simulate","json","async-queue","io-base","io-upload-iframe","io-form","yui2-treeview","panel","cookie","datatable","datatable-sort","resize-plugin","dd-plugin","escape","moodle-core_filepicker","moodle-core-notification-dialogue"]},"core_comment":{"name":"core_comment","fullpath":"https:\/\/www.latinoamericacomparte.com\/aulavirtual\/lib\/javascript.php\/1770849391\/comment\/comment.js","requires":["base","io-base","node","json","yui2-animation","overlay","escape"]}},"logInclude":[],"logExclude":[],"logLevel":null};
M.yui.loader = {modules: {}};

//]]>
</script>

<style>
:root {
  /* Colores principales EDIFICA */
  --negro: #1a1a1a;
  --purpura: #7b2d8e;
  --naranja: #ff6b3d;
  --rosa: #e64980;
  
  /* Colores de fondo */
  --bg-principal: #f5f0fa;
  --bg-secundario: #ffffff;
  --bg-hover: #fef5ff;
  
  /* Textos */
  --texto-principal: #2d2d2d;
  --texto-secundario: #5a5f6e;
  --texto-claro: #ffffff;
  
  /* Sombras */
  --sombra-suave: 0 2px 8px rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.08);
  --sombra-media: 0 4px 12px rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.12);
  --sombra-profunda: 0 8px 20px rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.15);
}

/* ============================================
   RESET Y ESTILOS GENERALES
   ============================================ */

body {
  background: var(--bg-principal);
  color: var(--texto-principal);
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
  line-height: 1.6;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* ============================================
   HEADER - SIN POSITION FIXED
   ============================================ */

header,
#page-header,
.navbar {
  background: var(--bg-secundario) !important;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--purpura) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--sombra-media) !important;
  position: relative !important;
  z-index: 1030 !important;
}

/* Logo - Ajustes para evitar obstrucción */
.navbar-brand,
.logo {
  z-index: 1 !important;
  position: relative !important;
}

.navbar-brand img,
.logo img {
  max-height: 50px;
  height: auto;
  width: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Enlaces del header */
.navbar-nav,
.navbar-nav .nav-item,
.navbar-nav .nav-link {
  z-index: 10 !important;
  position: relative !important;
}

.navbar-nav .nav-link {
  color: var(--texto-principal);
  transition: color 0.2s ease;
}

.navbar-nav .nav-link:hover {
  color: var(--rosa);
}

/* Menú de usuario en header */
.usermenu,
.navbar .dropdown,
.navbar-nav .dropdown {
  z-index: 1040 !important;
  position: relative !important;
}

/* ============================================
   NAVEGACIÓN LATERAL
   ============================================ */

.block_navigation,
#nav-drawer {
  background: var(--bg-secundario);
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.1);
}

.block_navigation .list-group-item,
#nav-drawer .list-group-item {
  border-left: 3px solid transparent;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.block_navigation .list-group-item:hover,
#nav-drawer .list-group-item:hover {
  background: var(--bg-hover);
  border-left-color: var(--rosa);
  transform: translateX(3px);
}

.block_navigation .list-group-item.active,
#nav-drawer .list-group-item.active {
  background: rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.08);
  border-left-color: var(--purpura);
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ============================================
   DROPDOWNS
   ============================================ */

.dropdown-menu {
  background: var(--bg-secundario);
  border: 1px solid rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.15);
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: var(--sombra-profunda);
  margin-top: 8px;
  padding: 8px;
  z-index: 1050 !important;
  position: absolute !important;
}

.dropdown-menu .dropdown-item {
  padding: 10px 14px;
  margin: 2px 0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  z-index: 1051 !important;
}

.dropdown-menu .dropdown-item:hover {
  background: var(--bg-hover);
  color: var(--purpura);
}

/* ============================================
   TARJETAS Y BLOQUES
   ============================================ */

.block,
.card {
  background: var(--bg-secundario);
  border: 1px solid rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: var(--sombra-suave);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.block:hover,
.card:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--sombra-media);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.card-header,
.block .header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purpura) 0%, var(--rosa) 100%);
  color: var(--texto-claro);
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0;
}

.card-body,
.block .content {
  padding: 1.25rem;
}

/* ============================================
   BOTONES
   ============================================ */

.btn-primary,
button[type="submit"]:not(.close):not(.btn-close) {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--naranja) 0%, var(--rosa) 100%);
  color: var(--texto-claro);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(230, 73, 128, 0.3);
}

.btn-primary:hover,
button[type="submit"]:hover:not(.close):not(.btn-close) {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(230, 73, 128, 0.4);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: var(--negro);
  color: var(--texto-claro);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #2d2d2d;
  color: var(--texto-claro);
}

.btn-warning {
  background: var(--rosa);
  color: var(--texto-claro);
}

/* ============================================
   CURSOS
   ============================================ */

.coursebox,
.course-listitem {
  background: var(--bg-secundario);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--purpura);
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  box-shadow: var(--sombra-suave);
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.coursebox:hover,
.course-listitem:hover {
  border-left-color: var(--rosa);
  transform: translateX(3px);
  box-shadow: var(--sombra-media);
}

/* ============================================
   🌟 Estilos personalizados para la portada de EDIFICA
   ============================================ */

/* Ocultar el título "Cursos disponibles" */
body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main > h2,
body.pagelayout-frontpage .course-header h2,
body.pagelayout-frontpage h2:first-of-type {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Contenedor del banner de bienvenida */
body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main::before {
  content: '';
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 400px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8B3A94 0%, #E94789 50%, #FF6B6B 100%);
  border-radius: 24px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.25);
  margin: 2rem 0;
  position: relative;
  animation: fadeInScale 0.8s ease-out;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Efectos de fondo decorativos */
body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main::after {
  content: '';
  display: block;
  width: 500px;
  height: 500px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  border-radius: 50%;
  filter: blur(60px);
  position: absolute;
  top: -100px;
  right: -100px;
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Contenedor principal del contenido */
body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main {
  position: relative;
}

/* Banner con el mensaje de bienvenida mejorado */
body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main > div:first-of-type::before {
  content: 'LATINOAMÉRICA COMPARTE';
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 3rem;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
  letter-spacing: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  z-index: 2;
  animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out 0.2s both;
}

body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main > div:first-of-type::after {
  content: 'Bienvenido a EDIFICA\A\A Transforma tus sueños en empresas exitosas\A\A El programa que convierte emprendedores en verdaderos gestores de cambio ✨';
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 6rem;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  padding: 2rem 3rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: white;
  line-height: 1.5;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  z-index: 2;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out 0.4s both;
}

/* Contenedor de la lista de cursos (por si luego se desea mostrar con margen) */
body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-all {
  position: relative;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

/* ============================================
   🚫 Ocultar lista de cursos en la página principal
   ============================================ */
body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-all,
body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-all .coursebox,
body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-all .courses,
body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list,
body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-enrolled {
  display: none !important;
}

/* ============================================
   ✨ Animaciones
   ============================================ */
@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

/* ============================================
   FORMULARIOS
   ============================================ */

input[type="text"],
input[type="email"],
input[type="password"],
input[type="search"],
textarea,
select {
  background: var(--bg-secundario);
  color: var(--texto-principal);
  border: 2px solid rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.2);
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

input:focus,
textarea:focus,
select:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--rosa);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(230, 73, 128, 0.1);
}

/* ============================================
   FOOTER
   ============================================ */

footer,
#page-footer {
  background: var(--negro) !important;
  color: var(--texto-claro) !important;
  padding: 2rem 1.5rem !important;
  margin-top: 3rem !important;
  border-top: 3px solid !important;
  border-image: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--purpura) 0%, var(--rosa) 50%, var(--naranja) 100%) 1 !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}

footer h2,
#page-footer h2 {
  color: var(--rosa) !important;
  font-size: 1.8rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
  letter-spacing: 2px !important;
}

footer a,
#page-footer a {
  color: var(--naranja) !important;
  transition: color 0.2s ease;
}

footer a:hover,
#page-footer a:hover {
  color: var(--rosa) !important;
}

footer p,
footer div,
#page-footer p,
#page-footer div {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important;
  line-height: 1.8 !important;
}

footer .footer-links,
#page-footer .footer-links {
  display: flex !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  gap: 2rem !important;
  margin-top: 1rem !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
}

/* ============================================
   BADGES
   ============================================ */

.badge {
  background: var(--purpura);
  color: var(--texto-claro);
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ============================================
   TABLAS
   ============================================ */

table {
  width: 100%;
  background: var(--bg-secundario);
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

thead {
  background: var(--negro);
  color: var(--texto-claro);
}

th {
  padding: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

td {
  padding: 0.875rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(123, 45, 142, 0.1);
}

tr:hover {
  background: var(--bg-hover);
}

/* ============================================
   ENLACES
   ============================================ */

a {
  color: var(--purpura);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s ease;
}

a:hover {
  color: var(--rosa);
}

/* ============================================
   Z-INDEX JERARQUÍA COMPLETA
   ============================================ */

/* Modales - Nivel más alto */
.modal {
  z-index: 1055 !important;
}

.modal-backdrop {
  z-index: 1050 !important;
}

/* Dropdowns del header */
.navbar .dropdown-menu,
.usermenu .dropdown-menu {
  z-index: 1050 !important;
}

/* Menú de usuario */
.usermenu,
.navbar .dropdown {
  z-index: 1040 !important;
}

/* Header principal */
.navbar,
header,
#page-header {
  z-index: 1030 !important;
}

/* Navegación */
.navbar-nav,
.navbar-nav .nav-item {
  z-index: 10 !important;
}

/* Logo - Nivel bajo para no obstruir */
.navbar-brand,
.logo {
  z-index: 1 !important;
}

/* Dropdowns generales */
.dropdown-menu {
  z-index: 1000 !important;
}

/* Contenido principal */
#page,
#page-content,
.main-inner,
#region-main {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1 !important;
}

/* ============================================
   CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL Y DASHBOARD
   ============================================ */

/* Asegurar que el dashboard tenga espacio superior adecuado */
#page-wrapper #page {
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

/* Contenedor principal del contenido */
.container-fluid,
.container {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* Dashboard específico */
#page-content {
  background: transparent;
  padding: 1.5rem;
}

/* ============================================
   RESPONSIVE
   ============================================ */

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  footer .footer-links,
  #page-footer .footer-links {
    flex-direction: column !important;
    gap: 1rem !important;
  }
  
  footer h2,
  #page-footer h2 {
    font-size: 1.5rem !important;
  }
  
  .navbar-brand img,
  .logo img {
    max-height: 40px;
  }
  
  /* Ajustes responsive para mensaje de bienvenida */
  body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-all::before {
    min-height: 350px;
    padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  
  body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main > div:first-of-type::after {
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    top: 5rem;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  body.pagelayout-frontpage .frontpage-course-list-all::before {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    padding: 2rem 1rem;
    min-height: 320px;
  }
  
  body.pagelayout-frontpage #region-main > div:first-of-type::after {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
  }
}

/* ============================================
   ACCESIBILIDAD
   ============================================ */

:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--rosa);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

/* ============================================
   ANIMACIONES SUAVES
   ============================================ */

@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { 
    opacity: 0; 
    transform: translateY(20px);
  }
  to { 
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.95);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
}

.card,
.block {
  animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
}
</style>

</head>

<footer style="
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 120%, rgba(255,107,61,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%),
              radial-gradient(circle at 70% -20%, rgba(123,45,142,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%),
              linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a1a 0%, #121212 100%);
  color: #d6d6d6;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 25px 40px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-top: 3px solid;
  border-image: linear-gradient(90deg, #7b2d8e 0%, #e64980 50%, #ff6b3d 100%) 1;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
">

  <!-- Luz flotante animada -->
  <div style="
    position: absolute;
    top: -200px;
    left: 50%;
    width: 700px;
    height: 700px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,107,61,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    filter: blur(40px);
    animation: floatLight 6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    z-index: 0;
  "></div>

  <!-- Gradiente animado sutil -->
  <div style="
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 100%);
    background-size: 200% 100%;
    animation: moveGradient 8s linear infinite;
    z-index: 0;
  "></div>

  <div style="position: relative; z-index: 1;">
    <!-- Logo -->
    <h2 style="
      font-size: 28px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7b2d8e, #e64980, #ff6b3d);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,107,61,0.3);
    ">
      EDIFICA
    </h2>

    <!-- Texto principal -->
    <p style="font-size: 15px; color: #bfbfbf; margin-bottom: 5px;">
      © <span id="current-year">2025</span> Plataforma Educativa
    </p>

    <!-- Créditos -->
    <p style="font-size: 13px; color: #9c9c9c; margin: 0;">
      Desarrollado con 
      <span style="color:#e64980; display:inline-block; animation:pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;">❤</span> 
      por <strong style="color:#ff6b3d; font-weight:600;">Latino América Comparte</strong>
    </p>

    <!-- Links -->
    <nav style="
      margin-top: 25px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 25px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    ">
      <a href="#" style="
        color: #bfbfbf;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-size: 13px;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
        position: relative;
      " onmouseover="this.style.color='#ff6b3d'" onmouseout="this.style.color='#bfbfbf'">
        Términos de uso
      </a>
      <a href="#" style="
        color: #bfbfbf;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-size: 13px;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
      " onmouseover="this.style.color='#e64980'" onmouseout="this.style.color='#bfbfbf'">
        Privacidad
      </a>
      <a href="#" style="
        color: #bfbfbf;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-size: 13px;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
      " onmouseover="this.style.color='#7b2d8e'" onmouseout="this.style.color='#bfbfbf'">
        Soporte
      </a>
    </nav>
  </div>

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
      50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0.8; }
    }

    @keyframes moveGradient {
      0% { background-position: 0% 0%; }
      100% { background-position: 200% 0%; }
    }

    @keyframes floatLight {
      0% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); opacity: 0.7; }
      100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(30px); opacity: 1; }
    }
  </style>

  <script>
    document.getElementById('current-year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();
  </script>

if(module){var filename=parts.join('-');me.path=component+'/'+module+'/'+filename+min+'.'+me.type}else{me.path=component+'/'+component+'.'+me.type}};
YUI_config =
